project.component: { "keyToString": { "Composer Script.Run Dev Server.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "credentialsType com.jetbrains.php.remote.interpreter.ui.PhpCreateRemoteSdkForm": "Docker Compose", "credentialsType com.jetbrains.php.remote.interpreter.ui.PhpInplaceEditRemoteSdkForm": "Docker Compose", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "//wsl.localhost/Ubuntu/home/ksalopek/modern-app", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "ts.external.directory.path": "C:\\Program Files\\JetBrains\\PhpStorm 2025.3\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite", "mysql" ] } }
